palette_def_t(3) Library Functions Manual palette_def_t(3)

NAME

palette_def_t - Palette definition structure.

SYNOPSIS

#include <include/ascii-chat/video/ascii/palette.h>

Data Fields


const char * name
Human-readable palette name. const char * chars
Character sequence (ordered from dark to light). size_t length
Number of characters in sequence. bool requires_utf8
True if palette contains UTF-8 multi-byte characters. bool is_validated
True if palette passed validation checks.

Detailed Description

Palette definition structure.

Contains all information about a palette, including its character sequence, UTF-8 requirements, and validation status.

Note

Character sequence must be ordered from darkest to lightest for proper luminance mapping.

Definition at line 116 of file palette.h.
